metadata.notes: France: 2026 income tax bareme (Loi de finances 2026, applied to 2025 income), per part. Family quotient (parts) with plafonnement of 1,807 EUR per additional half-part; 10% professional-expense deduction (min 509, max 14,555); decote for low tax. Employee cotisations: old-age pension (6.9% to 1 PASS + 0.4% uncapped), Agirc-Arrco complementary pension, and CSG/CRDS (9.7% on 98.25% of gross to 4 PASS). PASS 2026 = 48,060. Single-taxpayer/sole-earner estimate.
